title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, enabling early evacuation warnings. The model provided high-confidence forecasts days before the Category 5 storm made landfall in Jamaica, demonstrating AI's role in meteorological prediction.
